title: Rollins Inc. (ROL) CEO Gary Rollins on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Rollins Inc. (NYSE:ROL ) Q2 2022 Results Conference Call July 27, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Joe Calabrese - IR Gary Rollins - Chairman and Chief Executive Officer John Wilson - Vice Chairman Jerry Gahlhoff - President and Chief Operating Officer Julie Bimmerman - Vice President, Interim Chief Financial Officer and Treasurer Conference Call Participants Tim Mulrooney - William Blair Ashish Sabadra - RBC Capital Markets Hans Hoffman - Jefferies Seth Weber - Wells Fargo Securities Brian Butler - Stifel Operator Greetings. Welcome to Rollins Inc. Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call.

title: Take the Zacks Approach to Beat the Market: Franklin Covey, Sea Limited, Rollins, Home Depot in Focus
text: Last week, our time-tested methodologies served investors well in navigating the market. Check out some of our last week's achievements.
